Alumni

Celebrating graduates who lead with purpose.

Our alumni community reflects Isaiyana’s values through service, innovation, and strong relationships around the world.

Meet GraduatesReconnect

Graduate Spotlight

Stories of impact and purpose.

Faith Njeri

Education Advocate

From Isaiyana to a leadership role in youth education, Faith credits her confidence to the school’s nurturing environment.

Samuel Otieno

ICT Entrepreneur

A strong foundation in CBC and ICT helped Samuel launch a tech startup that supports local schools.

Mercy Wanjiru

Community Nurse

Mercy serves her community with compassion and care after graduating with strong values and academic discipline.
